privacy.title: Privacy en gegevens
privacy.subtitle: Uw AVG-rechten — toegang, overdraagbaarheid en verwijdering
privacy.info: Identificatiegegevens worden 3 jaar bewaard vanaf de laatste boeking. U kunt op elk moment anonimisering aanvragen.

confirmAnonymize.title: Gegevensanonimisering bevestigen
confirmAnonymize.warning: Deze actie vervangt uw identificerende persoonsgegevens (naam, telefoon, e-mail, notities) door een anonieme identificator bij {{shopName}}.
confirmAnonymize.bullet1: · De operationele geschiedenis van boekingen (data, diensten, duur) wordt anoniem bewaard.
confirmAnonymize.bullet2: · Deze actie kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.
confirmAnonymize.bullet3: · De link naar deze boeking werkt niet meer na anonimisering.

privacy.otherRequests: Om gegevens te exporteren of anonimiseren bij andere barbershops waar je boekingen hebt, gebruik je de beheerlink van die boekingen. Voor andere AVG-verzoeken neem contact op met

reschedule.noSlots: Geen beschikbare tijdsloten op die dag.

privacy.title: Privacybeleid
privacy.intro: This policy explains how your personal data is processed when you use the booking system for {{shopName}}, supported by the Trimio platform. Read it before making a booking.

controller.title: Controller and processor
controller.p1: The controller of your personal data is {{shopName}}, the entity that defines the purposes and means of processing data collected for bookings.
controller.p2: Trimio acts as processor and provides the technology platform, processing data only under instructions from {{shopName}} and without editorial access to booking content for its own purposes.
controller.shopContact: For questions about your booking or personal data, contact {{shopName}} through the channels available on this site.
controller.platformContact: For questions about the Trimio platform, write to

data.title: Processed data, purposes and legal bases
data.intro: We process only the data strictly necessary to provide the booking service.
rows: Operational contact for confirmations, cancellations and rescheduling
Send the secure booking management link and confirmations
Service-specific information shared by the customer
Audit record of the consent given
Legal obligation / legitimate interest - GDPR Art. 6(1)(c)(f)
Proof that valid consent was obtained
data.noMarketing: We do not use your data for marketing, profiling or automated decisions with legal effects.

retention.title: Retention period and automatic anonymization
retention.intro: Identifying personal data is retained for the period required to manage the service, defend rights and comply with legal obligations.
items: Active operational data - while pending or confirmed bookings exist.
Historical data - up to 3 years after the last booking.
Consent record - up to 5 years for audit and compliance.
After the period or an anonymization request, identifying data is replaced by an anonymous identifier.
retention.footer: The system automatically anonymizes customer data after more than 3 years of inactivity. You can exercise erasure rights through the secure link for your booking.

processors.title: Processors and recipients
processors.intro: To provide the service, {{shopName}} and Trimio use technical processors that process data under documented instructions and GDPR safeguards.
processors.noSale: We do not sell or share personal data with third parties for marketing, advertising or profiling.

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.body: Some processors operate outside the European Union. Those transfers are made through appropriate legal mechanisms, including the EU-US Data Privacy Framework where applicable and standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: As a data subject, you have the following rights and can exercise them at any time:

items.title: Access
items.desc: Know what data we hold about you and obtain a copy through your booking link.

items.title: Portability
items.desc: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.

items.title: Rectification
items.desc: Correct inaccurate data by contacting the barbershop or rescheduling with updated data.

items.title: Erasure / Anonymization
items.desc: Request removal of identifying data; anonymous operational records may be retained.

items.title: Restriction
items.desc: Request that data be stored but not actively processed.

items.title: Objection
items.desc: Object to processing based on legitimate interest.

items.title: No automated decisions
items.desc: We do not make solely automated decisions with significant legal effects.

items.title: Withdraw consent
items.desc: Where applicable, you can withdraw consent without affecting prior lawful processing.

rights.contact: To exercise rights that cannot be fulfilled through the booking link, contact {{shopName}} through the public channels on this site or Trimio at
rights.responseTime: We respond within 30 days, extendable by another 60 days in complex cases.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.intro: This site does not use tracking, advertising or third-party analytics cookies. It only uses:
items: Local storage (localStorage) to keep the admin/barber session token while you are authenticated.
Cloudflare may set technical security and performance cookies required for the infrastructure to work.
cookies.footer: Because we do not use analytics or marketing cookies, no cookie consent banner is shown.

security.title: Security
security.body: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures, including encrypted transmission via TLS, restricted database access, firewall, expiring access tokens and cryptographic key authentication.

authority.title: Supervisory authority
authority.body: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. In Portugal, the competent authority is:
authority.name: CNPD - Portuguese Data Protection Authority
authority.address: Rua de São Bento 148-3.º, 1200-821 Lisbon · geral@cnpd.pt · cnpd.pt

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: This policy may be updated to reflect legal, technical or service changes. The version and date at the top of this page always identify the version in force.

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.shop: For questions related to your data in a specific booking, use the public contacts for {{shopName}} available on this site.
contact.platform: For questions about the Trimio platform as processor:
